retry_reason: If the object is not found, it likely does not exist; if refcount zero, object is being freed — retrying will not succeed.
contract_summary: RCU-protected get-wrapper that looks up a TVLV handler by type and version from the handler list and acquires a reference (via kref_get_unless_zero) on it if found and alive. Returns the handler with an elevated refcount, or NULL if not found or if the handler is being destroyed. The caller must release the reference with batadv_tvlv_handler_put() when done. The RCU lock is only held during the lookup; the returned object is safe to use without RCU as long as the caller holds the reference.
